title: OpenAI 宣布大规模扩建伦敦办事处
content: 位于旧金山的人工智能实验室正在伦敦扩大其研究团队。此举使其与谷歌 DeepMind 直接竞争英国顶尖研究人才。
original_title: OpenAI Announces Major Expansion of London Office
original_content: The San Francisco-based AI lab is growing its research team in London. The move puts it in direct competition with Google DeepMind for top research talent in the UK.

title: 特朗普采取行动禁止美国政府使用人类
content: 在国防部向 Anthropic 施压，要求其放弃对其人工智能如何被军队使用的限制之后，唐纳德·特朗普总统突然下达了命令。
original_title: Trump Moves to Ban Anthropic From the US Government
original_content: President Donald Trump’s sudden order comes after the Defense Department pressured Anthropic to drop restrictions on how its AI can be used by the military.

title: 亲身体验最新版本的 Google AI 图像生成器 Nano Banana 2
content: 谷歌最新的图像模型 Nano Banana 2 是一款强大的 AI 照片编辑器，可以刺破现实。嗯，有时候。
original_title: Hands-On With Nano Banana 2, the Latest Version of Google’s AI Image Generator
original_content: Google’s latest image model, Nano Banana 2, is a powerful AI photo editor that punctures reality. Well, sometimes.

title: 谁在真正运行人工智能？与亚历克斯·博雷斯 (Alex Bores) 展开数十亿美元的监管之战
content: 在全国各地的社区都在阻止数据中心建设的同时，五角大楼正在与 Anthropic 就谁来控制“军队如何使用人工智能”展开较量。随着人工智能的争论已被简化为“末日一代与婴儿潮一代”，一项州立法
original_title: Who’s really running AI? Inside the billion-dollar battle over regulation with Alex Bores
original_content: The Pentagon is playing chicken with Anthropic over who gets to control how the military uses AI while communities across the country are blocking data center construction. As the AI debate has been flattened to “doomers versus boomers,” one state legisla

title: 该公司声称在电池方面取得了突破。现在他们需要证明这一点。
content: 当一家公司声称已经创造了电池的圣杯时，肯定会出现一些问题。自从芬兰公司 Donut Lab 上个月宣布拥有一种新的固态电池技术，该技术已准备好大规模生产以来，人们的兴趣一直在升温
original_title: This company claims a battery breakthrough. Now they need to prove it.
original_content: When a company claims to have created what’s essentially the holy grail of batteries, there are bound to be some questions. title: 我正在指示战争部将人类指定为供应链风险
original_title: I am directing the Department of War to designate Anthropic a supply-chain risk

title: OpenAI 在历史上最大的私人融资轮之一中筹集了 110B 美元
content: 新一轮融资包括亚马逊的 500 亿美元投资以及英伟达和软银各 300 亿美元的投资，估值为 7300 亿美元。
original_title: OpenAI raises $110B in one of the largest private funding rounds in history
original_content: The new funding consists of a $50 billion investment from Amazon as well as $30 billion each from Nvidia and SoftBank, against a $730 billion valuation.

title: Mistral AI 与全球咨询巨头埃森哲签署协议
content: Mistral AI 与埃森哲建立了合作伙伴关系，该咨询公司最近还宣布与竞争对手 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 建立合作伙伴关系。
original_title: Mistral AI inks a deal with global consulting giant Accenture
original_content: Mistral AI lands a partnership with Accenture, the consultant that has also recently announced partnerships with rivals OpenAI and Anthropic.
